rules.description: The enrollment fee must meet specific conditions relative to the catalog fee and attendance percentage.
rules.condition: (enrollment.fee - catalog.fee) == 1700 and enrollment.fee % 250 == 0 and 1.0 < (enrollment.fee / catalog.fee) <= 1.5 and 75 <= exam.min_attendance_pct <= 100 and (exam.min_attendance_pct * enrollment.fee / 100) >= (catalog.fee - 200)
rules.on_failure: Adjust the enrollment fee to meet the specified conditions.

rules.description: Students qualify for the exam based on course name and attendance or fee clearance and eligibility
rules.condition: Check whether the course name contains 'Basics' or 'Intro' and the student's attendance percentage is 75 or higher, or if the course name does not contain 'Basics' or 'Intro' then the student must have cleared the exam fee and be marked as eligible
rules.on_failure: The student does not qualify for the exam due to insufficient attendance or uncleared exam fee or ineligibility

rules.description: Student must be marked as eligible if they have cleared the exam fee
rules.on_failure: Update the student's eligibility status to eligible

rules.description: Each course must have exactly one student enrolled
rules.condition: len([e for e in enrollment if e.course_id == catalog.course_id]) == 1
rules.on_failure: Review the enrollment records for the course to ensure only one student is enrolled

rules.description: The student must have paid their exam fees, be attending at least 70 percent of classes, and be marked as eligible.
rules.on_failure: The student needs to pay their exam fees, attend more classes, or be marked as eligible.
